description_long: This is a classic wooden whiskey barrel with a cylindrical shape, slightly bulging at the center and reinforced by four black metal hoops. The wood staves are dark and weathered, showing visible grain and some stains, suggesting age and use. The top surface is flat and features a printed label with the words 'Shauna's Whiskey' and 'Made in 1935', partially worn and faded. One side of the barrel has a small wooden bung, used for filling or emptying the contents. The overall appearance is rustic and authentic, with the black metal bands providing structural integrity and a visual contrast to the brown wood. This type of barrel is commonly found in urban settings such as bars, distilleries, or themed restaurants.
description: A weathered wooden whiskey barrel with black metal hoops, faded labeling, and a rustic appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat top with a partially visible printed label and three metal hoops.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the dark wood grain, metal hoops, and a faint marking on the right.
description_view_2: View with the clearest display of the 'Shauna's Whiskey' label and the wooden bung on the right.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the bung and partial text, with the metal hoops and wood texture prominent.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: Shauna's Whiskey, Made in 1935, faded white text
